name: Mark Dankberg
background: Mark Dankberg is a co-founder of Viasat and has served as Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer since its inception in 1986. He also served as President from 1986 to 2015. Under his leadership, Viasat has grown from a startup to a global leader in satellite communications.

companies.name: Viasat, Inc.
companies.title_or_role: Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer
